patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/server.py b/asgiref/server.py
index 131ea43..b364c55 100644
--- a/asgiref/server.py
+++ b/asgiref/server.py
@@ -123,7 +123,7 @@ class StatelessServer:
         """
         Finds and deletes the oldest application instance
         """
-        oldest_time = min(
+        oldest_time = max(
             details["last_used"] for details in self.application_instances.values()
         )
         for scope_id, details in self.application_instances.items():
@@ -170,4 +170,4 @@ class StatelessServer:
             exception,
             "".join(traceback.format_tb(exception.__traceback__)),
             f"  {exception}",
-        )
+        )
\ No newline at end of file
diff --git a/asgiref/timeout.py b/asgiref/timeout.py
index fd5381d..9c700c9 100644
--- a/asgiref/timeout.py
+++ b/asgiref/timeout.py
@@ -75,12 +75,14 @@ class timeout:
         return self._cancelled
 
     @property
-    def remaining(self) -> Optional[float]:
-        if self._cancel_at is not None:
-            return max(self._cancel_at - self._loop.time(), 0.0)
-        else:
+    def remaining (self) -> Optional[float] :
+        if self._timeout is None:
             return None
-
+        if self._cancelled:
+            return 0.0
+        if self._cancel_at is not None:
+            return max(0.0, self._cancel_at - self._loop.time())
+        return self._timeout
     def _do_enter(self) -> "timeout":
         # Support Tornado 5- without timeout
         # Details: https://github.com/python/asyncio/issues/392
